recipes.name: Birthday Cake Beach Theme
recipes.description:
🎂 Beach Theme Cake
🎉 Occasion: Son's 2nd Birthday
👦 Name: Visvaartith
📐 Size: 6" × 5" (Round)
🍫 Flavour: Chocolate Cake
Includes:
▫️ 3D fondant decorations (seashells, starfish, sea leaves, etc.)
▫️ Number 2 fondant topper
▫️ Name fondant: Visvaartith
▫️ Candles
🚗 Self-collection
